name: PT. Indah Prakasa Sentosa Tbk
summary: PT Indah Prakasa Sentosa Tbk. engages in integrated logistics, transportation, distribution, and retail business in fuel, lubricant, chemical, gasses, and FMCG in Indonesia. The company operates in three segments: Agents of Fuel, Lubricant and Gas; SPPBE; and Transportation and Logistic. Its services include land transportation, warehousing, container depot, and forwarding. The company provides services for industrial and marine fuels, industrial lubricants, and industrial and retail LPG. PT Indah Prakasa Sentosa Tbk. was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
